DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. No opposition filed, but an attorney recently substituted in for the formerly pro per plaintiff suggesting that plaintiff may now be able to allege one or more claims that are not uncertain. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike Portions Of The Plaintiffs Complaint is off calendar in light of the ruling on the Regents' demurrer.
